*Class Definition Overview*
The C++ class named UndergraduateStudent encapsulates all essential data for a university student including their full legal name unique identifier and grade point average.

*Member Variables Specification*
Inside the class we declare a string for the complete legal name an integer for the unique identifier code and a double for the cumulative grade point average.

*Constructor Implementation*
The constructor initializes these three fields ensuring every new student object starts with valid data for their name id and gpa.

*Access Methods Description*
Public getter methods allow external code to safely retrieve the name id and gpa without modifying the internal state of the object.

Any other questions?
